text:
JUMP SHOP is an officially licensed store of Shueisha run by BENELIC CO.,LTD (ベネリック株式会社, Benerikku Kabushikigaisha) that sells a wide variety of original merchandise and anime goods from works serialized in the Weekly Shonen Jump, similar to Jump Characters Store. Different companies operate the two sites, but often collaborate for events. Although both stores can share the same Jump merchandise listings, they also have their own exclusive or limited merchandise. Unlike Jump Characters Store, JUMP SHOP has physical stores across Japan. The online store for JUMP SHOP is abbreviated as JS Online (JSオンライン).

Collections With Their Own Page

The following is a list of links for merchandise collections that have their own designated articles, and whose products are not listed on this page.
Weekly Shōnen Jump Merchandise (Non-limited merchandise sold at JUMP SHOP and/or Jump Characters Store)
Jump Festa
Exhibition: Togashi Yoshihiro -Puzzle-
